headline: 'Make Tech Value Again': This is software's 'only hope'
summary: Portfolio Wealth Advisors president and chief investment officer Lee Munson chats with Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre on the New York Stock Exchange floor to discuss the market's (^DJI, ^GSPC, ^IXIC) reaction to the Iran war, volatility (^VIX), and more. Watch the video above to learn about how tech stocks (XLK) could become value stocks, to hear what Munson wants to see from the software (IGV) sector, and what might be next for gold (GC=F). To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination.

headline: DA Davidson Lowers PT on Salesforce, Inc. (CRM) Stock
summary: Salesforce, Inc. (NYSE:CRM) is one of the Best Automation Stocks to Buy According to Analysts. headline: Adobe Q1 Earnings Loom: Hold or Fold the Stock Ahead of Results?
summary: ADBE heads into Q1'26 results, with revenues expected at $6.28B and EPS at $5.88, as AI-powered Acrobat, Express and Firefly adoption aim to offset GenAI competition.

headline: Salesforce Expands Agentforce With Formula 1 Partnership And Finance Shift
summary: Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) expanded its Agentforce AI platform with new partnerships, including a project to power a Fan Companion Agent for Formula 1. The company is extending Agentforce into sectors such as sports and telecom to support large scale, real time digital engagement. Salesforce also updated its leadership structure, with Robin Washington taking on the role of Principal Accounting Officer. For investors watching the AI tools race, NYSE:CRM is pushing Agentforce beyond its core...

headline: Microsoft unveils Copilot Cowork agents built on Anthropic’s AI and E7 AI product suite as it seeks to calm investor concerns about AI eating SaaS
summary: Microsoft thinks enterprise customers will prefer its cloud-native Copilot Cowork to Anthropic’s local version and doubles down on per user pricing.

headline: North America Subscription Billing Management Market Report 2025-2033, Profiles of Aria Systems, BillingPlatform, Bright Market, Cerillion, Chargebee, Fusebill, Oracle, SaaSOptics, Salesforce, SAP
summary: The North America Subscription Billing Management Market is projected to surge from USD 2.96 billion in 2025 to USD 8.69 billion by 2033, growing at a 14.43% CAGR. This growth is fueled by rising demand for automated billing systems that enhance customer retention and operational efficiency.
